data.description:
Make git the source of truth for prompt text.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] git-tracked .rebar/prompts/<id>.md (front-matter) is canonical; Langfuse never consulted for prompt text (read-replica only).
- [ ] Resolve by committed git SHA; embed the resolved prompt's content hash in traces to detect divergence.
Files: src/rebar/llm/prompts.py, src/rebar/llm/reviewers/
data.title: WS-F1: Invert resolve_prompt to git-canonical
